DP.021.0000:
Hi, hi!\f
I’m the president of the Pokétch
Company!\f
DP.021.0001:
I’m developing a new Pokétch app,
but it’s not quite done.\f
My guess is that it will be ready
when you get a Gym Badge.
DP.021.0002:
Hi, hi!
Your patience is rewarded!\f
I’ve developed a new Pokétch app!\f
DP.021.0003:
That’s the Memo Pad!
It’s... Well, it is what it is!
DP.021.0004:
I’m developing a new Pokétch app,
but it’s not quite done.\f
My guess is that it will be ready
when you get three Gym Badges.
DP.021.0005:
Hi, hi!
Your patience is rewarded!\f
I’ve developed another new Pokétch
app!\f
DP.021.0006:
Having a map constantly displayed
is convenient, no?\f
You can also mark things, so it’s
that much more useful.
DP.021.0007:
I’m developing a new Pokétch app,
but it’s not quite done.\f
My guess is that it will be ready
when you get five Gym Badges.
DP.021.0008:
Hi, hi!
Your patience is rewarded!\f
I’ve developed yet another new
Pokétch app!\f
DP.021.0009:
I think it will be useful to know how
many people are communicating, like\r
in the Union Room.
DP.021.0010:
I’m developing a new Pokétch app,
but it’s not quite done.\f
My guess is that it will be ready
when you get seven Gym Badges.
DP.021.0011:
Hi, hi!
Your patience is rewarded!\f
I’ve developed still yet another new
Pokétch app!\f
DP.021.0012:
Check type matchups so you can make
all your attacks super effective!\f
You’ll become stronger than ever!
DP.021.0013:
Yup, all sorts of people will give
you Pokétch apps.\f
Everyone gets super happy that way!
DP.021.0014:
So, yup, what to do?\f
Do you think I should solicit new
Pokétch ideas?
DP.021.0015:
Oh, you can be sure I will keep
developing Pokétch apps.\f
Just like Pokémon, my Pokétch is
something that evolves!
DP.021.0016:
Welcome to the Pokétch Company.\f
We’re actually a family-run business,
so we’re not very impressive.
